head_sha_note: a0b20c6 is the final code/test commit; an additional chore commit carrying this closure artifact sits on top as the actual branch HEAD (its sha self-references and so is not pinned here).

blockers_encountered.description: `uv run pytest` resolved a user-site pytest 9.1.0 on Python 3.12 where litellm is not importable; the project venv is Python 3.10 and pytest lives in the optional `test` extra, not the default sync.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Ran the suite via the venv interpreter with the test extra: `uv run --extra test python -m pytest`. No source change required; reported to orchestrator as the correct local test invocation for this worktree.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added an optional injectable `env` parameter to `load_airlock_settings(config, env=None)` (defaults to os.environ) purely to keep the precedence-matrix tests deterministic without mutating process env. Singleton seam `configure_settings`/`get_settings` reads os.environ as specified.
agent_verify_result: pass (34 passed in test_fast_settings.py; regression: 122 passed across test_fast_router.py + test_fast_monitor.py + test_transparency_config.py; ruff check + format clean on all modified files)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.1-SET-loader on branch feat/0.5.1-SET-loader at a0b20c6; review, verify, merge. Loader is constructed at startup but intentionally not yet consumed — SET-unify migrates router/monitor/breaker consumers and fixes the R6 provider_budget_config nesting bug; SET-warnratio collapses the two warn-ratio constants. Note local tests must run via `uv run --extra test python -m pytest`.
